events.title: Brian May turns 79
events.blurb: Queen's legendary guitarist Brian May was born on July 19, 1947.

angles.name: Brian May tribute
angles.copy: Rock icon and astrophysicist Brian May celebrates his 79th birthday today. What's your favourite Queen guitar solo?

events.title: Mick Jagger turns 83
events.blurb: The Rolling Stones frontman Mick Jagger was born on July 26, 1943.

angles.name: Mick Jagger tribute
angles.copy: Eighty-three years young today! We're celebrating the enduring energy of Mick Jagger, the iconic voice of The Rolling Stones.

events.title: MTV launched in 1981
events.blurb: Music Television, MTV, launched on August 1, 1981, with The Buggles' 'Video Killed The Radio Star' as its first broadcast video.

angles.name: MTV anniversary
angles.copy: Forty-five years ago today, MTV changed the game, launching with The Buggles' iconic 'Video Killed The Radio Star'. Did it really kill the radio star?

events.title: Oasis released 'Definitely Maybe'
events.blurb: Oasis released their debut album 'Definitely Maybe' on August 29, 1994, which quickly became a Britpop defining record.

angles.name: Definitely Maybe anniversary
angles.copy: Thirty-two years since Oasis dropped 'Definitely Maybe' and changed the sound of a generation. What's your favourite track from the album?

events.title: Woodstock Festival began in 1969
events.blurb: The legendary Woodstock Music & Art Fair, a pivotal moment in counterculture history, kicked off on August 15, 1969.

angles.name: Woodstock anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago, peace, love, and music took over a field in New York as Woodstock began. Which performance do you wish you'd seen live?

events.title: Anniversary of Elvis Presley's death
events.blurb: Elvis Presley, the 'King of Rock and Roll', passed away on August 16, 1977, at the age of 42.

angles.name: Elvis tribute
angles.copy: Remembering the King today. It's 49 years since the world lost Elvis Presley, whose music continues to inspire generations.

events.title: Anniversary of Tupac Shakur's death
events.blurb: Influential rapper Tupac Shakur died on September 13, 1996, at the age of 25, six days after being shot in Las Vegas.

angles.name: Tupac tribute
angles.copy: Thirty years ago today, the music world lost a legend. Remembering Tupac Shakur, whose powerful lyrics and legacy live on.

events.title: Anniversary of Jimi Hendrix's death
events.blurb: Guitar icon Jimi Hendrix passed away on September 18, 1970, at the age of 27.

angles.name: Jimi Hendrix tribute
angles.copy: Fifty-six years since we lost the incomparable Jimi Hendrix. His groundbreaking guitar work continues to resonate through rock history.

events.title: The Beatles released 'Abbey Road'
events.blurb: The Beatles' iconic album 'Abbey Road' was released on September 26, 1969, featuring classic tracks like 'Come Together' and 'Here Comes the Sun'.

angles.name: Abbey Road anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-seven years ago today, The Beatles gave us 'Abbey Road'. That zebra crossing, those tracks – pure genius.

events.title: Chrissie Hynde turns 75
events.blurb: Chrissie Hynde, lead singer of The Pretenders, was born on September 7, 1951.

angles.name: Chrissie Hynde tribute
angles.copy: Celebrating the 75th birthday of the indomitable Chrissie Hynde. A true rock icon, still fronting The Pretenders with fierce style.

events.title: Liam Gallagher turns 54
events.blurb: Oasis frontman Liam Gallagher was born on September 21, 1972.

angles.name: Liam Gallagher birthday
angles.copy: Happy 54th birthday to the one and only Liam Gallagher! Still bringing the rock 'n' roll swagger. As you were!

events.title: John Lennon released 'Imagine' single
events.blurb: John Lennon's iconic peace anthem 'Imagine' was released as a single on October 11, 1971.

angles.name: Imagine anniversary
angles.copy: Fifty-five years ago, John Lennon gave the world 'Imagine'. Its message of peace and unity resonates just as powerfully today.

events.title: Apple launched the first iPod in 2001
events.blurb: Apple revolutionized portable music with the launch of the first iPod on October 23, 2001.

angles.name: iPod anniversary
angles.copy: Remember your first iPod? Twenty-five years ago today, Apple unveiled the device that put '1,000 songs in your pocket'.

events.title: James Bond Day
events.blurb: October 5th marks James Bond Day, celebrating the premiere of the first 007 film, 'Dr. No', in 1962.

angles.name: James Bond Day
angles.copy: Happy James Bond Day! Raise a martini (shaken, not stirred) to 007, a cinematic icon since 'Dr. No' premiered on this day in 1962.

events.title: John Lennon would have been 86
events.blurb: The legendary co-founder of The Beatles, John Lennon, was born on October 9, 1940.

angles.name: John Lennon tribute
angles.copy: On what would have been his 86th birthday, we remember the enduring spirit and musical genius of John Lennon.

events.title: John Cleese turns 87
events.blurb: British comedic legend John Cleese, co-founder of Monty Python, was born on October 27, 1939.

angles.name: John Cleese birthday
angles.copy: Celebrating 87 years of wit and wisdom! Happy birthday to the brilliant John Cleese, a true titan of British comedy.
